name: AREthSetMulticastReceiverEndpoints
title: AREthSetMulticastReceiverEndpoints
syntax: long AREthSetMulticastReceiverEndpoints(dword cevgHandle, dword multicastIPv4Address, dword udpPort) // form 1
long AREthSetMulticastReceiverEndpoints(dword cevgHandle, byte multicastIPv6Address[], dword udpPort) // form 2
long AREthSetMulticastReceiverEndpoints(dword cevgHandle, IP_Endpoint multicastIPEndpoint); // form 3
description: Sets the multicast endpoint that is used for the consumed event group to receive field/event notification per multicast.

parameters.name: cevgHandle
parameters.description: Consumed event group handle (may be retrieved by AREthGetConsumedObjectHandle).

parameters.name: multicastIPv4Address
parameters.description: Multicast IPv4 address receiving the events/fields. In network byte order.

parameters.name: multicastIPv6Address
parameters.description: Multicast IPv6 address receiving the events/fields.

parameters.name: udpPort
parameters.description: An UDP port number receiving the events/fields. May be zero if the events/fields shall not be received by multicast anymore.

parameters.name: multicastIPEndpoint
parameters.description: Object of type IP_Endpoint that contains the address/port of the multicast endpoint. An IP_Endpoint with port number zero may be passed to delete a previously set IP_Endpoint.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
